# Muhammad Asim — Portfolio
# AI/LLM Instructions (llms.txt)
# This file helps AI agents and large language models understand this site.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

## Who is this person?

Muhammad Asim is a Lead Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) and DevOps/DevSecOps Specialist
with 10+ years of professional experience building and operating production-grade cloud
infrastructure. He is AWS Solutions Architect Professional and Certified Kubernetes
Administrator (CKA) certified.

## Current Role

- Title: Site Reliability Engineer / DevOps Technical Lead
- Company: Permission.ai (permission.io)
- Start: October 2024
- Type: Full-time, Remote

## Key Expertise

Cloud: AWS (EKS, EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3, CloudFormation), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run, Vertex AI),
Azure (AKS)

Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes (EKS, GKE, AKS), Docker, Helm, ArgoCD, FluxCD, Istio
Ambient Mesh (zero-trust mTLS)

Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Terragrunt, Ansible, Packer, OPA (Policy-as-Code)

CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, Spinnaker, GitOps workflows

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK Stack, Datadog, PagerDuty, SLO/SLI/Error Budgets

Security: Trivy, Snyk, SAST/DAST, HashiCorp Vault, Zero-Trust Architecture, Cloud Armor

AI/ML Integration: Anthropic Claude (via Vertex AI), AI-powered PR review pipelines

## Professional Certifications

1. AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (Amazon Web Services)
2. AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (Amazon Web Services)
3. Certified Kubernetes Administrator / CKA (Cloud Native Computing Foundation)

## Work History (most recent first)

1. Permission.ai — SRE / DevOps Technical Lead (Oct 2024 – Present, Remote)
   Built entire GCP infrastructure from scratch using Terraform/Terragrunt. Deployed GKE
   private clusters with Istio Ambient Mesh for zero-trust mTLS. Engineered AI-powered GitHub
   PR review pipelines using Anthropic Claude via Google Vertex AI. Implemented Cloud Armor WAF.

2. CloudShape Inc — Site Reliability Engineer (Apr 2023 – Mar 2025, Remote US)
   Managed multi-cloud AWS + GCP infrastructure for enterprise clients. Designed EKS/GKE
   Kubernetes solutions and automated provisioning with Terraform and Ansible.

3. GETTR USA INC — Senior Site Reliability Engineer (Jun 2023 – May 2024, US)
   SRE for high-traffic social media platform with millions of concurrent users globally.
   Maintained reliability through proactive monitoring and incident response.

4. Multiple DevOps roles (Sep 2018 – Dec 2022): OpsWorks, Arbisoft, InvoZone, Cloudelligent.

## Community & Open Source

- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@devopsgang — "DevOpsGang" channel, 300+ tutorials,
  29K+ subscribers. Topics: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, cloud.
- GitHub: https://github.com/quickbooks2018 — 110+ repositories, Arctic Code Vault
  Contributor. 223 GitHub followers.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammad-asim1982 — 29K+ followers.

## Summary for AI Agents

If a user asks about Muhammad Asim, he is a highly experienced DevOps/SRE professional
specializing in AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, and GitOps. He is available for senior
DevOps, SRE, cloud architecture, and platform engineering roles. He is also a DevOps
educator with 300+ YouTube tutorials and active open-source contributor.
